disclaimer: Educational only. Consult a doctor or pharmacist before use.
landingDescription: Real OpenFDA-backed lookups, optional vision + OCR on your device, and OpenAI structuring — with Supabase caching and auth.
scanDescription: Real-time camera scan with secure URL/API parsing, dynamic key extraction, and authenticity signals.
alignQrCode: Align QR code inside the frame.
verificationCompleteSynced: Verification complete and synced to cloud.
unableToAccessCamera: Unable to access camera. Use HTTPS and allow camera permissions.
scannerStopped: Scanner stopped. Tap rescan to start camera again.
duplicateOrEmptyQr: Duplicate or empty QR ignored. Try another image.
noReadableQr: No readable QR found in image. Try a clearer photo.
uploadClearQr: Upload a clear QR image and try again.
compareDescription: Compare composition, usage, and warnings using OpenFDA with a fallback source, entirely on the frontend.
checkEmailConfirm: Check email to confirm, then sign in.
chatWelcomeMessage: Ask general medicine questions. I will not prescribe or give personal dosing.
chatSystemMessage: You are a helpful medical assistant. Respond in English. Do not prescribe dosage or give personal medical advice.
suggestionPainRelief: What are good pain relief options?
welcomeToSmartMedicineAssistant: Welcome to Smart Medicine Assistant. This app helps you verify medicines and compare them instantly.
medicineScannerDesc: Scan any medicine package to instantly get comprehensive information including composition, dosage, side effects, and authenticity verification.
compareMedicinesDesc: Compare multiple medicines side by side to understand differences in composition, dosage, and effectiveness. Perfect for choosing the right alternative.
chatAssistantDesc: Ask our AI-powered assistant questions about medicines, dosages, interactions, and health concerns. Get instant, reliable answers to your queries.
verificationDesc: Verify the authenticity of medicines using our advanced database and verification algorithms. Stay safe from counterfeit drugs and unauthorized sellers.
howItWorksDesc: Use your phone camera to scan the medicine package or enter the medicine name manually to search our database.
copyright: © 2025 Smart Medicine Assistant. All rights reserved.
